data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for 'Upgrade/downgrade with proration'.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Upgrade/downgrade with proration', but the evidence provided does not confirm this requirement. While the use case mentions a scenario where a member upgrades mid-cycle with a prorated charge applied, there is no concrete evidence of the actual implementation or verification of this functionality. Therefore, the evidence does not sufficiently support the requirement, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No concrete evidence of the upgrade/downgrade process and proration application.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add upgrade/downgrade validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the upgrade/downgrade process correctly applies proration.
